dailyNews.title: Iranian govt reveals scale of civilian casualties from US-Israeli strikes
dailyNews.description: Govt spokesperson Fatemeh Mohajerani says US-Israeli strikes have damaged more than 42,000 civilian sites across Iran.

dailyNews.title: Lupin bets on complex generics, biosimilars to power next US growth phase - Business Standard
dailyNews.description: Lupin bets on complex generics, biosimilars to power next US growth phase  Business Standard

dailyNews.title: Iran claims US and Israel using copycat ‘Lucas’ drones to frame it
dailyNews.description: Iran claims US and Israel using copycat 'Lucas' drones to frame it for regional attacks.

dailyNews.title: Trump's personal number is up for sale, report says - and CEOs, crypto investors are paying to get it
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump's personal mobile number has become Washington DC's most traded commodity, with CEOs offering cash and crypto investors offering cryptocurrency to obtain it, according to an investigation by The Atlantic.

dailyNews.title: Rahul Gandhi writes to PM Modi, seeks Bharat Ratna for BSP founder Kanshi Ram: ‘Deeply felt’
dailyNews.description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi's letter came as the nation commemorated Kanshi Ram's birth anniversary on Sunday, March 15.

dailyNews.title: US, China hold trade talks in Paris to clear path to Trump-Xi summit
dailyNews.description: The world's two largest economies trying to hash out trade issues before US President Trump is expected to visit China.

dailyNews.title: 'The Madison' star Michelle Pfeiffer credits one simple beauty secret for her ageless glow at 67
dailyNews.description: Hollywood legend Michelle Pfeiffer returns to television in "The Madison," reuniting with Kurt Russell. Co-stars call working with the Hollywood icons "surreal."

dailyNews.title: AI comes with a hefty charge. Are you the one who gets stuck with the bill?
dailyNews.description: Major tech companies scramble for power as AI data centers consume massive electricity, with utilities in Virginia, Texas warning of unprecedented demand.

dailyNews.title: Rising gas prices from Iran conflict put GOP on defense after previous Biden attacks
dailyNews.description: Gas prices have surged 50 cents per gallon amid Trump's Iran conflict, putting Republicans in the same position they previously criticized Biden for during his presidency.

dailyNews.title: Paige Spiranac applauds commenter for lewd remark that lifts her spirits
dailyNews.description: Golf influencer Paige Spiranac wrote on social media there is one commenter who can lift her spirits with a vulgar comment on Instagram.

dailyNews.title: Ben Shapiro praises Trump’s Iran strikes as ‘single bravest foreign policy move of my lifetime’
dailyNews.description: Ben Shapiro calls Trump's Iran strategy "the single bravest foreign policy move" of his lifetime, praising bold reassertion of American authority on the world stage.

dailyNews.title: NBA champion Glen Davis granted early prison release after fraud conviction
dailyNews.description: Former NBA star Glen Davis was released from prison after fraud conviction involving league's health plan. The NBA Finals winner player served time for defrauding benefits.

dailyNews.title: Sen Eric Schmitt pushes for legislation to tackle rising sports ticket costs
dailyNews.description: Sports fans face steep ticket prices with hidden fees on the secondary market. Sen. Eric Schmitt says consumers are getting ripped off and legislation is needed.

dailyNews.title: The real reason for sagging jowls, and what will and won't help, according to an expert
dailyNews.description: Jowls often appear suddenly but develop over years as collagen declines and facial fat shifts, a dermatologist says. Prevention and layered treatments matter more than trendy fixes.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon identifies 6 US airmen killed in refueling tanker crash in Iraq after midair collision
dailyNews.description: The War Department confirmed the identifies of the six U.S. airmen who were killed when a KC-135 refueling aircraft crashed in western Iraq during a mission.

topStories.title: Narcotics case: Naidu asks MP Putta Mahesh to stay away from party activities
topStories.description: The TDP has been maintaining a strong public stance against drug abuse and appropriate action will be initiated in the present case, depending on the investigation, says the party national president

topStories.title: ICC judge says US sanctions left her without bank cards and Google accounts
topStories.description: An ICC judge says sanctions imposed by the Trump administration are punishing her for carrying out her judicial duties.

topStories.title: Anti-Trump Oscar nominees abound as ceremony looks to navigate fraught political scene
topStories.description: This year's Oscar nominees include several outspoken anti-Trump figures, as host Conan O'Brien acknowledged this week it could be a delicate dance at Hollywood's big night.

topStories.title: Trump seeks warships from other countries to help secure Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: Trump calls for international warships to secure Strait of Hormuz as Iran allegedly threatens global oil shipping routes from the Middle East region.

topStories.title: For Trump, a Promised Economic Boom Collides With the Costs of War
topStories.description: President Trump had envisioned a growing economy and improving fortunes for American families in 2026. That appears at risk in his war with Iran.

topStories.title: F.C.C. Chair Threatens to Revoke Broadcasters’ Licenses Over War Coverage
topStories.description: The comment from Brendan Carr came on the heels of a social media message from President Trump criticizing the news media’s coverage of the war with Iran.

topStories.title: Trump Administration Turns to Migrant Workers to Help Farm Labor Shortage
topStories.description: As the president’s immigration policies squeeze an already tight supply of farm labor, the Trump administration is making it cheaper to hire foreign farmworkers.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Turns to Migrant Workers to Help Farm Labor Shortage
dailyNews.description: As the president’s immigration policies squeeze an already tight supply of farm labor, the Trump administration is making it cheaper to hire foreign farmworkers.

dailyNews.title: How Minnesota Beat Trump
dailyNews.description: Moms donating their breast milk to strangers, dads taking someone else’s kids to school: Minnesotans showed a basic human impulse to look out for their neighbors.

dailyNews.title: What Trump Didn’t Know About Iran
dailyNews.description: Ali Vaez, the Iran project director at the International Crisis Group, explains the history of miscalculations that led to the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he's not ready to make a deal with Iran as Gulf countries report new attacks
dailyNews.description: The war, which shows no signs of ending soon, has upended global air travel, disrupted oil exports from the region and sent fuel prices rising across the world.

dailyNews.title: U.S. intel shows Iran's late leader was wary of son in power, sources say
dailyNews.description: U.S. intelligence has circulated to President Trump's inner circle that Iran's late supreme leader had misgivings about his son replacing him, viewing Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei as not very bright.

dailyNews.title: Exclusive: Trump says Iran is ready to make a deal but ‘the terms aren’t good enough yet’
dailyNews.description: In a phone call with Meet the Press moderator Kristen Welker, President Trump says Iran had been “defeated militarily” and was ready to make a deal but “the terms aren’t good enough yet,” declining to say what those terms are. He also said Iran’s Kharg Island, home to a critical oil terminal for the country, had been “decimated,” though he could hit it again “just for fun.”

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran is ready to negotiate a ceasefire but he's not ready to make a deal
dailyNews.description: In a wide-ranging interview, President Donald Trump said he’s not ready to make a deal to end the war with Iran, despite Iran’s willingness to do so.

dailyNews.title: Trump says there’s been ‘total obliteration’ of Iran militarily
dailyNews.description: President Trump told NBC News’ Kristen Welker in a nearly half hour phone conversation that Iran has been “militarily defeated” and he believes other countries will help to secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'
dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'

dailyNews.title: Trump calls U.S. operations in Iran 'a little excursion'
dailyNews.description: Trump calls U.S. operations in Iran 'a little excursion'

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
